description.description: Specifies the description of the MSK configuration, providing context or details about its purpose or usage.

kafka_versions.description: Specifies the Kafka versions that the configuration is compatible with; must match supported versions in AWS MSK.

name.description: Specifies the name of the MSK configuration, which must be unique within the AWS account.

server_properties.description: Defines the server properties for the MSK configuration, provided as a JSON or text-encoded string; must adhere to Kafka configuration requirements.
